title: Fix invalid active workflow
objective: Read governance/AGENT_CONTEXT.md first. Fix concrete GitHub Actions failure: if .github/workflows/governance-validation-ci.yml exists and contains archived placeholder text such as ARCHIVED, Moved to:, or At:, move it to governance/archive/invalid_active_workflows/governance-validation-ci.yml.invalid preserving content. Ensure .github/workflows/governance-validation-ci.yml is absent after move. Do not create a new active workflow. Do not claim Release PASS. Create governance/archive/invalid_active_workflows/MANIFEST.md with moved path and reason. Append one concise AGENT_CONTEXT entry: invalid active governance workflow archived; next action KZ-1 runners skeleton repair. No issue comments.
